LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MARCH-12-2024 HEARING RE: PETITIONER ASSET SECURITY CONSULTING, LLC'S NOTICE OF HEARING FOR APPROVAL FOR VERIFIED PETITION FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS, THE COURT GRANTS THE PETITION FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS. COUNSEL LOZANO IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing For Approval For Verified Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Mar-12-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. JUAN LOZANO, Esq. of The Law Office of Juan C. Lozano (tel: 619-647-9129) for Petitioner.
Payee ARIANNA MORAS, in pro per present.

Hearing Re: PETITIONER ASSET SECURITY CONSULTING, LLC's Notice Of Hearing For Approval For Verified Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights.

Matter discussed. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court grants the petition for approval for transfer of structured settlement payment rights.

Counsel Lozano is to prepare and submit a proposed order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Hearing For Approval For Verified Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
